case_title: SUZMAN DESIGN ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. DUSTIN MOORE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUZMAN DESIGN ASSOCIATES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
OPPOSITION TO PLT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF DEFTS AMENDED ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, DUSTIN INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DMDESIGN STUDIO

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SUZMAN DESIGN ASSOCIATES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED AS TO THE 3RD, 4TH, 5TH 6TH, 9TH, 10TH, 11TH, 13TH AND 14TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES AND SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND, 7TH AND 8TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE 3RD, 4TH, 5TH 6TH, 9TH, 10TH, 11TH, 13TH AND 14TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES FOLLOW THE FORM AND PRACTICE IN THIS AND OTHER CALIFORNIA COURTS AND SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER AS TO ANY OF THOSE DEFENSES WOULD NOT ADVANCE THE CASE. THE ALLEGATIONS OF THE 2ND, 7TH AND 8TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES DO NOT CONSTITUTE NEW MATTER, AND DEFENDANTS ARE GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND, IF THEY CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE TRUE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Douglas C. MacLellan, Esq., from Kaplan & MacLellan, 415-447-8300, for plaintiff and moving party
No Appearance by defendant's attorney.

Discussed and Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF SUZMAN DESIGN ASSOCIATES, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is
Denied. The second through eleventh, thirteenth and fourteenth affirmative defenses are not irrelevant, false or improper. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Douglas C. MacLellan, Esq., from Kaplan & MacLellan, 415-447-8300, for plaintiff and moving party
No Appearance by defendant's attorney.

Discussed and Tentative Ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF SUZMAN DESIGN ASSOCIATES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT.
Overruled as to the 3rd, 4th, 5th 6th, 9th, 10th, 11th, 13th and 14th affirmative defenses and sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the 2nd, 7th and 8th affirmative defenses. The allegations of the 3rd, 4th, 5th 6th, 9th, 10th, 11th, 13th and 14th affirmative defenses follow the form and practice in this and other California courts and sustaining the demurrer as to any of those defenses would not advance the case. The allegations of the 2nd, 7th and 8th affirmative defenses do not constitute new matter, and defendants are given leave to amend, if they can do so in good faith, to allege true affirmative defenses. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT

(302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
